megan.address:
|

Monday Cleanings - PREMIUM -

•  Sanitize all kitchen surfaces and appliances

•  Sanitize all bathrooms,  change bath rugs if necessary according to last date changed - master spot check for mold if so use bestbet cream cleanser

•  Sweep and mop all floors

•  Vacuum carpeted areas/rugs

•  Empty garbage cans and replace liners

•  NO bed linen change just make all beds - pull tight duvet and bed sheets.

•  Washing one sink load of dishes

•  Rotate cleaning of vertical surfaces such as baseboards, windows, and doors

•  High dusting for ceiling fans, light fixtures, air vents, and cobwebs

•  spot check guest room/bathroom in renovated part of the garage.


Friday Cleanings:

•  Sanitize all kitchen surfaces and appliances

•  Sanitize all bathrooms - change bath rugs if necessary according to last date changed

•  Sweep and mop all floors

•  vacuum carpeted areas/rugs

•  Make all beds

•  Empty garbage cans and replace liners

•  Light horizontal surface dusting

•  Changing of bed linens

•  Master and Mia’s room linens are in the hallways closet next to the laundry basket. Master bedding is first two shelves of bedding, shelf below is Mias

•  Itay - room next to master, bedding is in closet inside the room, top left corner, comforter change located beneath the bed in storage box/bag

•  Jonathan - downstairs room, bedding inside wardrobe on the very left side
| Call or buzz Andrew for garage access if parking is difficult
There will be a key code to get in.

|

They don't need all areas of the home cleaned, just the bathrooms, main living areas and kitchen.

The wife works at home and will be the main contact and will do a walk through.

|

Touch up cleaning- horizontal surfaces only

2 offices inside and main reception desk

board room 

main entrance has a waiting room - dust sweep & mop

Kitchen/break room - countertops and spot check inside of fridge and outside.

exam rooms and ultrasound room

2 half baths - toilet and sink sweep and mop

|

Looking to do a deep clean and then schedule monthly recurring cleaning ($335 premium monthly) - called in from Church Bulletin

only 1 or 2 bedrooms need to be cleaned since others are being used for storage
The client only needs the kitchen and bathrooms to be cleaned, and the stairs as well. As well as regular dusting, mopping/sweeping, and vacuuming.

nick.address:
Please include time to do a fridge cleaning. We weren't able to finish the cleaning last time due to time and personnel constraints so we are trying to make it up |

Client only wants female cleaners

There’s only one visitor parking she will provide, will need to meet nearby to carpool or carpool from the office. To find parking: You will need to call Victoria once you get there: (425) 770-1316. She will drive her car down to meet you, and then you can follow her car to the garage. 

The client will have to leave for work and would like us to finish the cleaning before she leaves.

|

Kitchen, dining room, living room and bathroom on main floor only. 

Catholic mens house looking to get help with these areas only. Back door will be unlocked. Please have cleaning between 10am-3pm

Payment: check will be on black cabinet next to the dining table

|

Use buzzer box to call owner 460, then key will be under mat in front of door
She need help with assembling shelves in her garage and organizing

|

8/15/2025

4 dogs = lots of dog hair, have started to just use vacuum while sweeping to save time.  First cleaning prior was very dusty due to air duct clean out, so slowly getting all the dust out but also dogs run in and outside of the house. Make sure behind and under dog bowls are clean.
